sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: New workers' comp option gives self-insured employers more control
feed.summary: Employers Holdings (NYSE: EIG) has expanded its offerings by launching a new Excess Workers’ Compensation product for large self-insured employers, groups, pools, and public entities. This new product integrates specific and aggregate excess coverage with advanced features like predictive analytics, real-time claims visibility, and risk advisory services. The aim is to provide self-insured organizations with greater control, clarity, and the tools to mitigate losses and optimize their total cost of risk.

feed.title: Insider Purchase: Director at $KKR Buys 43,872 Shares
feed.summary: A director at KKR, Matt Cohler, recently purchased 43,872 shares of the company's stock for an estimated $4.5 million, significantly increasing his holdings. This transaction is part of a broader pattern of insider buying at KKR, with 9 insider purchases and no sales in the past six months. The article also provides insights into KKR's hedge fund activity, revenue, congressional stock trading, and analyst ratings, indicating a generally positive outlook.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Simon Keeton Sells 48,860 Shares of ON Semiconduct
feed.summary: Simon Keeton, Group President of PSG at ON Semiconductor Corp, sold 48,860 shares of the company on February 17, 2026, reducing his total ownership to 198,995 shares. This transaction follows a year with no insider buys and eight insider sells at ON Semiconductor. The stock was trading at $71.75, showing a market cap of $27,839.524 million and a high P/E ratio, and is considered modestly overvalued based on its GF Value.

feed.title: IQVIA to Speak at Citi's 2026 Unplugged MedTech and Life Sciences Access Day
feed.summary: IQVIA Holdings Inc. announced that its CFO, Ron Bruehlman, and incoming CFO, Mike Fedock, will speak at Citi's 2026 Unplugged MedTech and Life Sciences Access Day on February 26, 2026. A live audio webcast of the presentation will be available on the IQVIA Investor Relations website. IQVIA is a leading global provider of clinical research services and healthcare intelligence, committed to using AI responsibly to improve patient outcomes worldwide.

feed.title: Indonesia's Pertamina, Halliburton to cooperate on oilfield recovery-U.S.-ASEAN Business Council
feed.summary: Indonesia's state-owned oil and gas company, Pertamina, and U.S. oilfield services giant Halliburton, have agreed to cooperate on oilfield recovery efforts. This collaboration was announced by the U.S.-ASEAN Business Council and is part of broader trade and investment deals signed between Indonesia and U.S. firms, totaling over $7 billion. The partnership aims to enhance oil production through advanced recovery techniques.

feed.title: Moody’s Earnings Call: Record Year, Confident Outlook
feed.summary: Moody's recently held its Q4 earnings call, revealing record revenue, widening margins, and strong adjusted EPS for 2025. The company highlighted significant growth in private credit and recurring analytics revenue, alongside capital return plans including share repurchases and a dividend increase. Despite some headwinds from divestitures and government cancellations, Moody's expects continued growth with robust guidance for 2026.

feed.title: Hecla Mining Earnings Call Flags Transformational Silver Upswing
feed.summary: Hecla Mining (HL) reported record 2025 revenues of $1.4 billion and net income of $321 million, with adjusted EBITDA reaching $670 million. The company aggressively reduced debt, transforming its balance sheet, and recorded strong silver and gold output. Despite a projected short-term dip in silver production for 2026, Hecla is poised for future growth and aims to be a leading North American silver producer, capitalizing on expanding margins and increased exploration efforts.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley opened accounts for Epstein trusts as late as 2019
feed.summary: New documents from the U.S. Justice Department reveal that Morgan Stanley opened accounts for Jeffrey Epstein's trusts between 2015 and 2019, despite his 2008 conviction as a sex offender. This occurred during a period when other major banks like Deutsche Bank and JPMorgan were severing ties with Epstein. While one Epstein-related account was closed in 2017 due to risk concerns, another was opened in 2019 and subsequently closed, underscoring ongoing banking relationships despite widespread awareness of his reputational risks.

feed.title: Activist investor builds stake in Fiserv
feed.summary: Activist investor Jana Partners has acquired a stake of less than one percent in Fiserv, purchasing 2.2 million shares. The investor is urging Fiserv to take action to boost its stock price, which saw a significant decline in the previous year. Jana Partners supports Fiserv's "One Fiserv" action plan but also advocates for faster expansion of core banking operations and a strategic review to potentially offload non-core assets.

feed.title: Watch Morgan Stanley's Wilson: We're In New Economic, Earnings Cycle
feed.summary: Mike Wilson, Chief US Equity Strategist and Chief Investment Officer for Morgan Stanley, discusses his 2026 market outlook, emphasizing that market broadening is currently underway as the US economy and market enter a new cycle. He notes that many sectors of the economy previously in recession are now starting to recover, representing the true story of market broadening. Wilson reiterates his year-end S&P 500 target of 7,800.

feed.title: Community Healthcare Trust Announces Dividend and Q4 Results
feed.summary: Community Healthcare Trust (CHCT) reported Q4 2025 net income of $14.4 million, or $0.51 per diluted share, with FFO and AFFO at $0.49 and $0.55 per diluted share respectively. The company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.4775 per share, payable March 4, 2026. CHCT also acquired a $28.5 million facility, disposed of three properties for $31.6 million, and has five additional properties under contract totaling $122.5 million in expected investments.

feed.title: Shriram Revankar, Dolby Labs SVP, sells $198k in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Shriram Revankar, Senior Vice President at Dolby Laboratories Inc. (NASDAQ:DLB), sold 3,000 shares of Class A Common Stock for a total of $198,420. This transaction leaves him with 83,218 shares, including restricted stock units. The sale follows Dolby Laboratories reporting strong financial results for the first quarter of 2026, with both EPS and revenue surpassing expectations.

feed.title: Gary Black Sees Warner Bros Deal Uncertainty As ‘Overhang’ On Netflix Stock
feed.summary: Gary Black believes the uncertainty surrounding the Warner Bros. Discovery deal is creating an "overhang" on Netflix's stock, presenting an asymmetrical return opportunity for investors. Netflix has allowed WBD to reopen talks with Paramount for a limited period after Paramount presented an alternative offer. Despite this, Netflix's CEO maintains that their deal offers the best value for WBD shareholders.

feed.title: Cohler Matt, KKR director, buys $4.5m in company stock
feed.summary: KKR & Co. Inc. Director Matt Cohler recently purchased 43,872 shares of the company's common stock for over $4.5 million on February 17, 2026. This transaction increased his direct holdings to 45,477 shares, with additional indirect ownership through a trust. The purchase comes amidst recent company developments, including a slight earnings miss for Q4 2025, a revenue beat, exploration of a renewable energy joint venture with SK Group, and revised analyst price targets from Barclays and Goldman Sachs.

feed.title: Invitation Homes forecasts annual FFO below estimates on higher costs
feed.summary: Invitation Homes (INVH) has forecasted its annual Funds From Operations (FFO) to be below market estimates. This projection is attributed to anticipated higher costs. The article is a brief report from Reuters on the financial outlook for the company.

feed.title: PG&E CEO Poppe sells $559k in company stock
feed.summary: PG&E Corp CEO Patricia K. Poppe sold 31,250 shares of company stock for a total of $559,375 on February 18, 2026. This transaction was conducted under a pre-arranged trading plan. Despite the sale, Poppe retains significant direct and indirect holdings in the company, and recent news for PG&E includes affirmed ratings with a positive outlook from Moody's, although Q4 2025 earnings slightly missed analyst expectations.

feed.title: KKR & Co. Executives Make Significant Stock Purchases
feed.summary: KKR & Co. Co-CEO Scott C. Nuttall and Director Matt Cohler recently made significant stock purchases in the company. Nuttall acquired 125,000 shares for over $12.8 million, increasing his direct ownership to more than 15.5 million shares. Cohler purchased 43,872 shares for over $4.5 million, raising his direct holdings to 45,477 shares.

feed.title: Julie Duffy Sells 19,857 Shares of Textron (NYSE:TXT) Stock
feed.summary: Julie Duffy, EVP of Textron (NYSE:TXT), sold 19,857 shares of the company's stock for approximately $1.96 million on February 13, reducing her position by 34.9%. Textron recently reported Q4 earnings, missing consensus EPS by $0.01 but exceeding revenue expectations, and provided FY 2026 EPS guidance. The stock currently trades near its 12-month high with analysts offering mixed ratings.

feed.title: E Robert Lupone Sells 28,056 Shares of Textron (NYSE:TXT) Stock
feed.summary: E. Robert Lupone, Executive Vice President of Textron (NYSE:TXT), sold 28,056 shares of company stock on February 17th, 2026, for approximately $2.77 million, reducing his stake by 21.25%. Textron recently reported Q4 revenue of $4.18 billion, a 15.6% year-over-year increase, though its EPS of $1.73 slightly missed estimates. The company currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $97.20.

feed.title: The PNC Financial Services Group (NYSE:PNC) EVP Richard Kevin Bynum Sells 7,407 Shares
feed.summary: Richard Kevin Bynum, EVP of The PNC Financial Services Group, sold 7,407 shares of PNC stock on February 17th for approximately $1.71 million, reducing his stake by 79.23%. The company recently reported strong earnings, beating analyst expectations with $4.88 EPS and $6.07 billion in revenue, and pays a quarterly dividend of $1.70. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus target price of $234.44, while institutional investors hold a significant portion of the shares.

feed.title: CTO Realty Growth to Announce Q4 Earnings on February 19
feed.summary: CTO Realty Growth is scheduled to release its Q4 earnings on February 19, with analysts projecting a FFO of $0.48 and revenue of $37.91 million. Recent activities include signing three new leases at an Atlanta lifestyle center and successfully selling the Shops at Legacy North for $78 million. The company's 8.4% yield is highlighted as a key attractive feature for investors seeking stable cash flows despite concerns about its preferred stock yield.

feed.title: International Business Machines (NYSE:IBM) Trading 1% Higher - Here's Why
feed.summary: International Business Machines (IBM) shares rose 1% to approximately $261, with a positive "Moderate Buy" average analyst rating and an average price target of $330.07. The company recently exceeded quarterly earnings estimates and declared a quarterly dividend of $1.68 per share. Insider activity shows a director buying 1,000 shares, and institutional investors have adjusted their holdings.

feed.title: Judge rejects Live Nation bid to dismiss U.S. lawsuit claiming it monopolized live concerts
feed.summary: A federal judge has rejected Live Nation Entertainment's attempt to dismiss a U.S. lawsuit accusing it of monopolizing the live concert industry, clearing the way for a potential antitrust trial. The lawsuit, filed by the Department of Justice and 39 states, alleges Live Nation monopolizes markets for ticketing, concert-booking, venues, and promotions. Shares of Live Nation fell after the decision, which stated there is a genuine dispute over whether the company used monopoly power to block competition.

feed.title: PYPL Investors Have Opportunity to Lead PayPal Holdings, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is announcing a class action lawsuit on behalf of investors who purchased PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) common stock between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that PayPal made false and misleading statements regarding its financial targets and its salesforce's ability to achieve growth. Investors have until April 20, 2026, to move the Court to serve as lead plaintiff in this securities fraud lawsuit.

feed.title: Omnicom doubles its cost savings target and plans to exit some smaller markets and non-strategic businesses
feed.summary: Omnicom announced it is doubling its cost savings target and plans to divest from smaller markets and non-strategic businesses. This strategic move follows its recent acquisition of IPG and was detailed in its latest quarterly report, outlining efforts to streamline its operations and enhance efficiency.

feed.title: Equinox Gold: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Equinox Gold Corp. reported a net income of $197.5 million, or 25 cents per share, in its fourth quarter, with adjusted earnings of 21 cents per share. The company's revenue for the quarter was $681.4 million, contributing to a full-year profit of $221.5 million and revenue of $1.82 billion. This financial overview comes from data provided by Zacks Investment Research.

feed.title: Centerspace (CSR) Tops Q4 FFO Estimates
feed.summary: Centerspace (CSR) reported Q4 FFO of $1.25 per share, surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.21, but missed revenue expectations. Despite the FFO beat, the company's shares have declined by 4.7% since the beginning of the year. The stock currently holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), indicating it is expected to perform in line with the market.

feed.title: JXI: Three Reasons I Like This Utilities Fund For The Current Environment (NYSEARCA:JXI)
feed.summary: This article evaluates the iShares Global Utilities ETF (JXI) as an investment option, highlighting its global utilities exposure and diversification across geographies and sub-sectors, particularly its European holdings. The author, who has rebranded to "The Worker's Advocate," specializes in macro analysis and manages income portfolios for his private investing community. He emphasizes investing in quality, diversification, and a long-term approach for sustained financial success.

feed.title: Bank Of Montreal (BMO) Receives a Hold from National Bank
feed.summary: National Bank analyst Gabriel Dechaine maintained a Hold rating on Bank Of Montreal (BMO) with a price target of C$186.00. This rating comes despite Raymond James upgrading BMO to a Buy on February 13. The company's market cap is C$136.2B with a P/E ratio of 16.77, and insider sentiment is neutral.

feed.title: Icon Energy Shareholders Approve Director, Auditor and Governance Amendments at 2026 AGM
feed.summary: Icon Energy shareholders approved key governance measures at their 2026 Annual Meeting, including the election of Evangelos Macris as Class II director and the ratification of Ernst & Young Hellas as the independent auditor for 2026. Investors also approved amendments to the company's charter and bylaws to enable uncertificated shares, shareholder written consents, and board authority to formalize these changes, aiming to streamline corporate governance. Despite these approvals, TipRanks' AI Analyst "Spark" rates ICON as Neutral due to weak financial performance and a bearish technical setup.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Securities Class Action Filed Against PayPal Holdings, Inc. – Investors Encouraged to Contact Kirby McInerney LLP
feed.summary: Kirby McInerney LLP has announced a class action lawsuit against PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:PYPL) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that PayPal created a false impression of reliable revenue outlook and growth, minimizing risks, and that their optimistic growth plan fell short. Investors who suffered losses are encouraged to contact the firm to request lead plaintiff appointment by April 20, 2026.

feed.title: News Corp updates $1B share repurchase authorization details
feed.summary: News Corp has provided an update on its $1 billion stock repurchase program, initially authorized in July 2025. The program targets Nasdaq-listed Class A and Class B common shares to enhance shareholder value, with Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC facilitating the repurchases. While an analyst has rated NWSA as a "Buy" with a $24.50 price target, TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, considers it "Neutral" due to strong fundamentals and a positive earnings outlook being tempered by weak technicals and a relatively expensive valuation.

feed.title: Nordson (NASDAQ:NDSN) Exceeds Q4 CY2025 Expectations
feed.summary: Nordson (NASDAQ:NDSN) reported Q4 CY2025 results that exceeded Wall Street's revenue expectations, with sales up 8.8% year-on-year to $669.5 million. The company's adjusted EPS of $2.37 was in line with analyst estimates, and management provided better-than-expected guidance for both next quarter's revenue and full-year revenue and adjusted EPS. Despite the revenue beat and raised guidance, the article notes that organic revenue missed and EBITDA fell short of estimates, leading to a "weaker quarter" despite the initial stock price increase.

feed.title: Booking Holdings Q4 2025 Results: Sales Up 16%, Room Nights Booked Rise - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Booking Holdings (NASDAQ:BKNG) reported strong Q4 2025 results, with revenue reaching $6.35 billion, a 16% increase year-over-year, and surpassing Wall Street expectations. The company also saw a significant operational improvement, with room nights booked increasing by 24 million to 285 million, and a free cash flow margin rising to 22.3%. Despite a projected deceleration in revenue growth for the next 12 months, the company's past three-year compounded annual growth rate of 16.3% highlights its consistent performance.

feed.title: US agency sues Coca-Cola bottler over employee event that excluded men
feed.summary: A U.S. civil rights agency has sued Coca-Cola Beverages Northeast, a bottler and distributor of Coca-Cola products, for sex discrimination. The lawsuit alleges that the company violated federal law by hosting an employee networking event in September 2024 that excluded men. This marks the first lawsuit by the U.S. Equal Employment Opportunity Commission against a workplace diversity program since President Donald Trump took office, aligning with his administration's stance against certain diversity, equity, and inclusion initiatives.

feed.title: TransDigm Stock Hits New Highs: Can This Aerospace Giant Keep Climbing?
feed.summary: TransDigm Group Inc. (TDG) has reported another strong quarter, beating Wall Street expectations and raising its guidance, pushing its stock to new highs. Despite its stretched valuation, analysts remain largely constructive on the aerospace components manufacturer due to its strong commercial aftermarket demand, pricing power, and high margins. Investors now face the decision of whether to add, hold, or take profits, weighing its premium valuation against its consistent performance and strategic position in the aerospace sector.

feed.title: Edison cuts bonuses for top executives in wake of last year's L.A. fire (EIX:NYSE)
feed.summary: Edison International announced a 40% reduction in top executive bonuses following the devastating Eaton wildfire in January 2025. This decision reflects the company's acknowledgement of the wildfire's significant impact, which resulted in 19 fatalities and considerable damage. The company's stock, EIX, is mentioned in connection with this news.

feed.title: Half of burned rail ties moved out of Dunnellon, CSX says
feed.summary: CSX Transportation has announced that approximately half of the burned rail ties from a large fire have been removed from Dunnellon. This update comes amidst other local news, including a dispute between GRU and the City of Gainesville, a new memorial for fallen Gilchrist County deputies, and fundraising efforts for a family killed in a Dixie County fire.

feed.title: Kensington finishes 2025 on a high note
feed.summary: Coeur Mining's Kensington mine in Southeast Alaska produced 106,068 ounces of gold in 2025, an 11% increase over 2024, exceeding its guidance for the year. This strong performance was driven by improved mill throughput and ore grades. The company has raised its 2026 production guidance for Kensington and expanded gold reserves by 9%, with plans to invest $14-15 million in exploration to further replace and expand resources.

feed.title: ENPH Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Enphase Energy, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit – Company Announcement
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that Enphase made false and misleading statements regarding its ability to manage inventory and mitigate the effects of the Residential Clean Energy Credit, overstating its financial prospects. Investors have until April 20, 2026, to move the Court to serve as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: NYC Pension Groups Claim AT&T Violated Securities Law
feed.summary: Four New York City public pension funds have filed a complaint against AT&T Inc., alleging the company violated securities law by excluding a shareholder proposal from its 2026 proxy materials. The proposal requests that AT&T publicly disclose its Consolidated EEO-1 Report, which details workforce demographics by race, ethnicity, and gender. The pension funds argue that AT&T's exclusion of the proposal, despite previously disclosing the report voluntarily, constitutes "irreparable" harm to shareholders' voting rights.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Securities Class Action Filed Against PayPal Holdings, Inc. – Investors Encouraged to Contact Kirby McInerney LLP
feed.summary: Kirby McInerney LLP has filed a class action lawsuit against PayPal Holdings, Inc. on behalf of investors who purchased securities between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that PayPal created a false impression of reliable revenue outlook and growth, and minimized risks, leading to a significant stock price decline after disappointing Q4 2025 results and the withdrawal of 2027 financial targets. Investors who suffered losses are encouraged to contact the firm by April 20, 2026, to request lead plaintiff appointment.

feed.title: World Labs closes $1B investment backed by Nvidia, AMD and Autodesk
feed.summary: World Labs Inc., an AI model developer specializing in generating interactive 3D virtual environments, has secured $1 billion in funding. This significant investment round was backed by industry giants including Nvidia Corp., Advanced Micro Devices Inc., and Autodesk Inc., with Autodesk contributing $200 million and planning an AI research collaboration. The funding will further World Labs' development of "world models" like Marble, which creates 3D environments from various inputs, and is expected to increase the company's focus on robotics applications.

feed.title: The PNC Financial Services Group (NYSE:PNC) EVP Louis Robert Cestello Sells 4,279 Shares
feed.summary: PNC Financial Services Group EVP Louis Robert Cestello sold 4,279 shares of the company's stock for approximately $1 million, reducing his holdings by 18.49%. This transaction follows PNC beating its quarterly earnings expectations with $4.88 EPS on $6.07 billion revenue. The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts and pays a quarterly dividend of $1.70 per share.

feed.title: Insider Selling: The PNC Financial Services Group (NYSE:PNC) EVP Sells 2,500 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Alexander Overstrom, EVP at The PNC Financial Services Group (NYSE:PNC), sold 2,500 shares of the company's stock on February 18, 2026, for a total of $584,775. This transaction reduced his stake by over 10%. The sale occurred amidst strong financial performance from PNC, which reported impressive Q4 earnings and revenue, and a "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts with an average price target of $234.44.

feed.title: Electronic Arts (NASDAQ:EA) CFO Stuart Canfield Sells 1,500 Shares
feed.summary: Electronic Arts (NASDAQ:EA) CFO Stuart Canfield sold 1,500 shares of the company's stock on February 17, 2026, for a total of $299,850, reducing his ownership by over 20%. Following the sale, Canfield directly owns 5,897 shares valued at over $1.1 million. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.19 per share, payable on March 18th to shareholders of record by February 25th.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Electronic Arts (NASDAQ:EA) Insider Sells 2,500 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Electronic Arts (NASDAQ:EA) insider Laura Miele sold 2,500 shares of the company's stock on February 17th, with the transaction valued at $498,825. This sale follows two other recent transactions in January and December, bringing her total sales to 7,500 shares in the last three months. The company's stock was trading at $200.23 midday, and analysts currently have a "Hold" rating on EA with a consensus target price of $186.95.

feed.title: Becton, Dickinson and Company (NYSE:BDX) Director Sells 953 Shares
feed.summary: Becton, Dickinson and Company (NYSE:BDX) Director Bertram Scott sold 953 shares of the company's stock for a total of $174,027.33, reducing his position by 2.53%. This sale occurred on February 18th, and details were filed with the SEC. After the transaction, Scott directly owns 36,763 shares valued at approximately $6.71 million.

feed.title: GOOG stock price today: Alphabet Class C nudges up as Google unveils America‑India Connect AI infrastructure plan
feed.summary: Alphabet's Class C shares (GOOG) saw a slight uptick after Google announced its "America-India Connect" AI infrastructure initiative, alongside new AI funding. The company plans to significantly increase capital expenditures for AI infrastructure by 2026, leading to investor focus on AI spending controls and potential impacts on profit margins. Google also faces an EU deadline for feedback on its search ad auctions, adding regulatory concerns to investor considerations.

feed.title: Brown & Brown Acquires American Adventure Insurance Assets
feed.summary: Brown & Brown's Dealer Services division has acquired the assets of American Adventure Insurance (The Protectorate Group Insurance Agency), a company specializing in insurance solutions for various vehicles at dealerships. This acquisition will see American Adventure's team join Brown & Brown Dealer Services, with its owner Paul Bender reporting to Mike Neal, president of the division. The deal aims to expand Brown & Brown's capabilities and innovative solutions for dealers nationwide.
